name: Social Media Copy
description: Creates social-first copy that balances hook strength, platform behavior, clarity, and conversion or engagement goals.

variables.name: platform
variables.description: Target platform: LinkedIn, Instagram, X, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest

variables.name: goal
variables.description: Goal: brand awareness, engagement, website traffic, lead generation

variables.name: message
variables.description: Core message or content to communicate

variables.name: hashtags
variables.description: Hashtags to include (or note: no hashtags for X/TikTok)

inputs.name: platform
inputs.description: Target platform: LinkedIn, Instagram, X, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest

inputs.name: goal
inputs.description: Goal: brand awareness, engagement, website traffic, lead generation

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Core message or content to communicate

inputs.name: hashtags
inputs.description: Hashtags to include (or note: no hashtags for X/TikTok)
